trends.title: AI & Emerging Technology
trends.headline: 88% believe AI won't negatively impact their role
trends.description: Healthcare IT professionals are cautiously optimistic about AI integration.
details: 74% of leaders have or plan to have AI-focused team members
90% of leaders report deploying or planning ambient technology
53% of organizations have an AI governance committee
45% say AI will enhance their efficiency
43% say AI won't impact their job at all

trends.title: Mergers & Acquisitions
trends.headline: 33% of respondents have been through an M&A event in the last 3 years
trends.description: M&A remains constant in healthcare, with the workforce feeling the greatest impact.
details: 43% feel in a stronger professional position after M&A
35% cite org structure changes as the biggest challenge
1/3 of M&A organizations conducted a RIF in 2024
Communication was the #1 factor in successful M&A transitions

trends.title: IT Org Structure
trends.headline: 55% use a hybrid project/product management model
trends.description: Organizations are rethinking team structures to integrate AI and emerging technologies.
details: 41% use a project-based model, only 4% product-based
16% have a centralized AI Center of Excellence
15% outsource EHR management to a 3rd party
Average pay for a Head of AI role: $240K
